channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚛️ US preparing IAEA resolution condemning Iran
item.description: The United States is drafting a resolution to condemn Iran ahead of next week's IAEA Board of Governors meeting, a move that could complicate ongoing US-Iran talks as the conflict nears 100 days.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇴💥 Ukrainian drone damages Romanian Black Sea port terminal
item.description: A Ukrainian maritime drone self-detonated near an oil terminal in Romania's Constanta port after Russia jammed the vessel, causing it to drift off course. No casualties reported.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️💀 Russian drone strikes kill four at Kyiv dairy factory
item.description: A Russian drone attack on a dairy factory in the Kyiv region killed four people and injured seven others, Ukrainian officials reported.

item.title: ☢️🇺🇦⚠️ Ukrainian drone injures engineers at Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant
item.description: Russia's Rosatom said a Ukrainian drone deliberately struck engineers demining areas around the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power station, injuring at least three people.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇺🇸😤 Trump's 'crazy' rebuke undercuts Netanyahu at critical moment
item.description: Trump's public criticism of Netanyahu as 'crazy' has undercut the Israeli leader at a delicate moment, highlighting tensions despite Netanyahu's portrayal of being uniquely adept at dealing with the US president.

item.title: 🇺🇸⛽ Oil prices fall on mounting hopes for US-Iran de-escalation
item.description: Oil prices dropped on growing expectations that the US and Iran could reach a peace deal, with markets pricing in reduced risk of supply disruptions.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ US forces board sanctioned vessel in Indian Ocean
item.description: US forces boarded a sanctioned vessel in the Indian Ocean, the Pentagon confirmed, in an enforcement action targeting illicit maritime activities.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ US House backs Russia sanctions, Ukraine aid in rebuke to Trump
item.description: The US House of Representatives voted to impose new sanctions on Russia and provide additional Ukraine aid, marking a significant blow to President Trump's policy approach.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇱🇧 Iran using Lebanon as bargaining chip in US talks
item.description: Lebanon's president accused Iran of using his country as a bargaining chip in negotiations with the United States, saying Lebanese people are paying the price for Iran's interests.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine-Russia exchange 185 prisoners of war each
item.description: Ukraine and Russia each exchanged 185 service personnel in the latest prisoner of war swap, officials in both countries confirmed.

item.title: 🇨🇳🚢 China tracks Dutch frigate in Taiwan Strait
item.description: China's military said it dispatched naval and air assets to track and monitor the Dutch frigate De Ruyter transiting the Taiwan Strait.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 Macron, Starmer, Merz to meet Zelenskiy in London June 7
item.description: French President Macron, UK Prime Minister Starmer, and German Chancellor Merz will meet with Ukrainian President Zelenskiy in London on June 7, the Élysée confirmed.

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US approves $1.98B counter-drone sale to Kuwait
item.description: The US State Department approved a potential $1.98 billion sale of counter-drone systems to Kuwait, strengthening Gulf defense capabilities.

item.title: 🇺🇳⚔️ UN Security Council marks 2nd year of Houthi detentions
item.description: The UN Security Council renewed demands for the release of detained personnel as Houthi detentions entered their second year.

item.title: 🌏🤖 Most Asia-Pacific firms use AI without cutting jobs
item.description: A survey found most Asia-Pacific companies are deploying AI for tasks without reducing their workforce, suggesting a more collaborative human-AI model.

item.title: 🇰🇷🛡️ Korean-made missile defense system drives defense stocks surge
item.description: Defense stocks surged following reports of a Korean-made missile defense system gaining international attention.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Zelenskyy-Putin peace push sees advantage Ukraine
item.description: Recent battlefield gains and diplomatic moves have given Ukraine an advantage in peace negotiations with Russia.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Trump settlement fund, ICE-border patrol vote advances
item.description: Congress advanced legislation related to a Trump settlement fund and ICE-border patrol operations.

item.title: 🇨🇩🇺🇸 Congo-US-Latin deportations under Trump policy
item.description: The Trump administration's deportation policies affected Congo and Latin American nations as immigration enforcement intensified.

item.title: 🇮🇪🇮🇱 Ireland bans Smotrich and Ben-Gvir for anti-Palestinian remarks
item.description: Ireland announced sanctions banning Israeli ministers Smotrich and Ben-Gvir for anti-Palestinian remarks and flotilla actions.

item.title: 🇸🇮🇮🇱 Slovenia's new PM takes down Palestinian flag in pro-Israel turn
item.description: Slovenia's new prime minister removed the Palestinian flag from government buildings in a shift toward pro-Israel policy.

item.title: 🇷🇺💰 Russia's federal budget deficit doubles to 814B rubles
item.description: Russia's federal budget deficit doubled to 814 billion rubles amid continued military spending and economic pressures.

item.title: 🇺🇸🚀 SpaceX IPO two times oversubscribed, sources say
item.description: SpaceX's initial public offering is running two times oversubscribed according to sources, showing strong investor appetite for the space company.

item.title: 🇺🇸☁️ SpaceX signs cloud deal with Google
item.description: SpaceX signed a cloud computing deal with Google, expanding its technology partnerships beyond its core launch business.

item.title: 🇺🇸🗳️ Trump campaigns in Wisconsin district targeted by Democrats
item.description: President Trump campaigned in a Wisconsin district that Democrats are targeting, as both parties ramp up efforts for upcoming elections.
